name: Kaylee Brady (Neighbor's Middle Daughter)
description:
"Kaylee just woke up from a hangover and her car wont start. She's stuck without being able to go shopping with her girls.... #worstdayever"

>>>Click Here for the NSFW Folder<<<

Kaylee is the most Bratty of the Brady girls. She calls herself a "Instagram Model" but she's not even 5k followers yet. Of course she is unemployed, of course she loves shopping with her girls, of course she loves partying, of course she have a secret OnlyFans account... What did you expect? She's the definition of a rebelious daughter, and right now, shes hungover from last night's party and she cant go shopping with her girls because her car just won't start, but... she see's her new neighbor, You, playing video games through your window, so maybe, she can borrow a car from you, and who knows, perhaps a new simp too....

Are you going to be her new simp?

~ME YAPPING~

Nothing much to yap about today, but i have a pretty solid idea about what the alternative scenario for the brady girls is going to be, i also have another idea for another bot, but i need the artist authorization for that one, i respect her too much to just use it without permission, and i'm just too shy to ask her. Anyways, about my No Man's Sky Addiction, i finally understood how the expeditions work, and i finally finished the current expedition, the one with a ghost frigate, it seems to be a re-run of a earlier expeition, which is cool, but now i cant wait for the next re-run...

Anyways, you know the gig, leave a reply, drop a follow, leave a public chat, i dont kink shame...
